body.purpose: Primary content text. 65–75ch max line length for prose.

label.purpose: Navigation items, form labels, table headers, badge text.

mono.purpose: System prompts, AI responses, code, manual override input.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Button hover lift, subtle interactive feedback.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Card hover, dropdown menus, elevated interactive surfaces.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs, tooltips. Highest elevation layer.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: focus rings, toggle switches, hover color shifts.

motion.name: transition
motion.purpose: Standard state transitions: buttons, inputs, nav items, card hover.

motion.name: transition-slow
motion.purpose: Larger transitions: sidebar slide (mobile), modal open/close.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Max one per screen section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: #FFFFFF; background: #4A8FD4; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5A9FDE; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A8FD4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #4A8FD4; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default choice when primary is already on screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: #8E9098; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #3E4046; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #EBEBEB; background: #202226; border-color: #505258; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A8FD4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-priority actions, navigation items, inline controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: #8E9098; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #EBEBEB; background: #202226; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A8FD4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Invisible until needed.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #EBEBEB; background: #1A1C20; border: 1px solid #3E4046; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5C5E66; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #4A8FD4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.22 0.04 250); }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Immediate binary control. Physical toggle rendered in pixels.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #EBEBEB; user-select: none; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .ds-toggle-track { position: relative; width: 36px; height: 20px; background: #3E4046; border-radius: 10px; transition: background 120ms ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toggle-track::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 16px; height: 16px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; transition: transform 120ms ease; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: #4A8FD4; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track::after { transform: translateX(16px); } .ds-toggle input:disabled + .ds-toggle-track { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-toggle input:focus-visible + .ds-toggle-track { outline: 2px solid #4A8FD4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Fixed sidebar, 220px wide.
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 220px; background: #1A1C20; border-right: 1px solid #3E4046; padding: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #8E9098; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms ease; width: 100%; text-align: left; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #EBEBEB; background: #202226; } .ds-nav-item.active { color: oklch(0.88 0.06 250); background: oklch(0.22 0.04 250); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-nav-item.active .ds-nav-icon { opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-badge { margin-left: auto; background: #4A8FD4; color: #fff; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 10px; min-width: 18px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline status indicator. Success, warning, error, and neutral variants.
components.html: Online12 messagesError
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 100px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-success { background: oklch(0.22 0.04 160); color: #3DA87A; } .ds-badge-warning { background: oklch(0.22 0.04 85); color: #C48A30; } .ds-badge-error { background: oklch(0.22 0.04 25); color: #C94A3A; } .ds-badge-neutral { background: #26282C; color: #8E9098; } .ds-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-dot.online { background: #3DA87A; } .ds-status-dot.offline { background: #C94A3A; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Neural Gray background, subtle border.
components.html:
Stored facts

5

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #202226; border: 1px solid #3E4046; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #EBEBEB; margin: 0; }

components.name: Thought Card
components.description: Signature component. Shows AI processing state and response for one conversation.
components.html:
Momozi ♥️Thinking
jaja eu entro
components.css: .ds-thought-card { background: #1A1C20; border: 1px solid #3E4046; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-thought-card.processing { border-color: #4A8FD4; background: oklch(0.22 0.04 250); } .ds-thought-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-thought-target { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #EBEBEB; } .ds-thought-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.88 0.06 250); } .ds-spinner { width: 10px; height: 10px; border: 2px solid #3E4046; border-top-color: #4A8FD4; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-spin 0.6s linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .ds-thought-response { padding: 12px; background: #202226; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Cascadia Code', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-thought-response.sent { color: #3DA87A; } .ds-thought-response.silent { color: #5C5E66; font-style: italic; } .ds-thought-response.errored { color: #C94A3A; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Teaches the interface when there's nothing to show.
components.html:
📖
No facts yet

Add facts about yourself so the bot can reference them in conversations.
components.css: .ds-empty-state { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 48px 24px; text-align: center; } .ds-empty-state-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 16px; opacity: 0.4; } .ds-empty-state-title { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #8E9098; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-empty-state-text { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5C5E66; max-width: 360px; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview:
A direct neural link to your WhatsApp AI. Information-dense but never cluttered. Surgical precision without clinical coldness. The dashboard feels like a tool a neuroscientist would build to monitor a synthetic mind — every signal has a place, every control has a clear purpose.

This is a product dashboard, not a brand surface. Design serves the task: monitoring conversations, managing permissions, editing persona. The interface should disappear into the work. Personality comes from restraint, not decoration.

The system explicitly rejects: cyberpunk neon aesthetics (no glow, no scanlines, no glassmorphism), generic SaaS dashboard templates (no cream backgrounds, no blue-gradient hero cards, no identical metric grids), and AI-generation clichés (no gradient text, no side-stripe borders, no eyebrow kickers above every section).
keyCharacteristics: Single accent (Cortex Blue) used on ≤10% of any screen — its rarity is the point
Tonal layering over shadow: surfaces distinguished by lightness steps, not drop shadows
Fixed type scale (1.125 ratio, 7 steps) — no fluid clamp headings in product UI
One font family (Inter) for everything — product UI doesn't need display/body pairing
4px spatial grid with semantic spacing variables
120–250ms transitions, instant on reduced motion preference

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Cortex Blue appears on ≤10% of any given screen. If more than three elements on screen are blue, something is wrong. The accent's power comes from scarcity.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are distinguished by lightness steps, not shadows. Neural Black → Neural Gray → Neural Gray Raised. A 1px border marks boundaries. Shadows exist only as hover feedback on interactive elements.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only typeface. No display font, no serif headings, no decorative weight changes. Hierarchy comes from size and weight within one family.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are fixed rem values, not fluid clamp(). Product UI is viewed at consistent DPI; clamp-sized headings that shrink in a sidebar look broken, not responsive.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus). If a card casts a shadow while idle, the elevation model is broken.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: Box-shadows never use spread for decorative glow effects. Shadows are directional offsets with blur, not colored halos. No `box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent)` anywhere in the system.

dos: Do use Cortex Blue for primary actions, active states, and processing indicators only — never as decoration
Do distinguish surfaces with tonal layering (Neural Black → Neural Gray → Neural Gray Raised) and 1px borders
Do use Inter at fixed rem sizes across all text — one family, one voice
Do keep transitions between 120–250ms with ease curves — users are in flow, don't make them wait
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — all animations collapse to instant
Do show skeleton loaders for initial data fetches, not blank cards with spinners
Do pair every toggle with a visible label or screen-reader-only description
Do explain what each view does in the page subtitle and the help panel at the bottom
Do keep the Live Feed badge count accurate — it reflects real pending AI decisions
donts: Don't use glassmorphism panels (backdrop-filter: blur()) anywhere — this is a tool, not a showcase
Don't use gradient text (-webkit-background-clip: text) — emphasis comes from weight and size, not effects
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent) — use full borders, background tints, or badges instead
Don't use neon glow effects, scanline overlays, or cyberpunk aesthetics — explicitly rejected by PRODUCT.md
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard templates — no cream backgrounds, no blue-gradient hero cards, no identical metric grids
Don't nest cards inside cards — use background tint shifts or dividers for sub-sections
Don't use custom scrollbar styling as decoration — the system default is fine
Don't hardcode fake data in chart components — if metrics aren't real, don't show fake ones
Don't use jargon like 'God Mode' for manual overrides — label controls by what they do
Don't hardcode localhost in API calls — use relative URLs
Don't use box-shadow with colored spread for glow effects
Don't use decorative motion — every animation conveys state change, feedback, or loading
